source: BSData wh40k-10e catalog (cross-referenced against Wahapedia keyword list, verified 2026-03-10)
notes: BattleScribe stores a 'Genestealer' model entry inside the 'Genestealers' unit entry.
Stats, weapons are on the model entry; keywords, infoLinks, and pts=75 are on the unit entry.
Pipeline must inherit unit-level category data for model-level lookup to work correctly.
TYRANIDS keyword comes from 'Faction: Tyranids' category — same known gap as Hive Tyrant.
VANGUARD INVADER keyword comes from a direct category link on the unit entry.
Rules (Scouts, Synapse) are infoLinks on the *unit* entry, not the model entry.
Whether these surface for the model entry depends on pipeline inheritance — set expectedRules: []
to avoid false negatives; add entries once pipeline behaviour is confirmed.
Invulnerable Save (5+) is a profile-type infoLink, not a rule — not in expectedRules.
Pts: 75 is on the unit entry; model entry has no own pts cost.

knownDiscrepancies.note: Confirmed systemic gap: TYRANIDS keyword missing in Hive Tyrant and Swarmlord audits. Same extraction path.
